name: libany-uri-escape-perl
title: libany-uri-escape-perl
summary: module to load URI::Escape::XS preferentially over URI::Escape
description:
module to load URI::Escape::XS preferentially over URI::Escape
URI::Escape is great, but URI::Escape::XS is faster. Any::URI::Escape loads
URI::Escape::XS and imports the two most common methods if XS is installed.
